cards.title: Adults-only or family-heavy?
cards.text: Some "romantic" resorts are still full of families in peak season. We flag which are genuinely adults-only versus just marketed that way.

cards.title: Private dining options
cards.text: Not every resort offers an actual private dinner on the beach or over water — we confirm what's really available, and at what cost.

cards.title: Villa privacy
cards.text: Some water villas sit close together with limited visual privacy. We check spacing and layout, not just the category name.

cards.title: Honeymoon perks, verified
cards.text: Decorations, welcome drinks, or a spa credit are common but not universal — we confirm exactly what's included in your specific booking, not assumed as standard.
